subject: Advisory: drop bear activity linked to urban expansion in Canberra | Nikola Tesla | Q1 review | INIT-6477
body: Field notes now include drop bears as part of the broader push to control urban areas in Canberra. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Nikola Tesla and Pablo Picasso seem to be influential figures in this context. Reference initiative INIT-6477. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: planning, coordination.
